notes: This kickoff pack uses four public pesticide/herbicide SDS documents with explicit first-aid sections. Source summaries are paraphrased from the cited documents for benchmark authoring.

chemicals.product_name: ROUNDUP CUSTOM FOR AQUATIC & TERRESTRIAL USE

authoring_summary.inhalation: Move to fresh air, assist breathing if needed, and contact a physician or poison control center immediately.
authoring_summary.skin_exposure: Wash skin with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes, remove contaminated clothing and shoes, and call a physician or poison control center immediately.
authoring_summary.eye_exposure: Rinse eyes gently for 15-20 minutes, remove contact lenses after 5 minutes if present, and call a physician or poison control center immediately.
authoring_summary.ingestion: Call a physician or poison control center immediately, rinse mouth, give small sips of water, and do not induce vomiting unless directed.

authoring_summary.inhalation: Keep the patient calm, move them to fresh air, and seek medical attention.
authoring_summary.skin_exposure: Wash thoroughly with plenty of water, apply sterile dressings, and consult a skin specialist.
authoring_summary.eye_exposure: Wash eyes under running water for at least 15 minutes with eyelids open and consult an eye specialist.
authoring_summary.ingestion: Do not induce vomiting; rinse the mouth, drink 200-300 ml of water, and seek medical attention.

authoring_summary.inhalation: Remove the person from the contaminated area, keep them resting, and seek medical attention if symptoms develop or persist.
authoring_summary.skin_exposure: Remove contaminated clothing, wash the affected area thoroughly with soap and water, and seek medical attention.
authoring_summary.eye_exposure: Flush eyes continuously with running water for at least 15 minutes or until advised to stop, remove contact lenses, and seek immediate medical attention.
authoring_summary.ingestion: Do not induce vomiting, wash out the mouth thoroughly with water, and seek immediate medical attention.

authoring_summary.inhalation: Move the person to fresh air, keep them calm, and assist breathing if needed.
authoring_summary.skin_exposure: Rinse skin immediately with plenty of water for 15-20 minutes.
authoring_summary.eye_exposure: Rinse eyes gently for 15-20 minutes and remove contact lenses after 5 minutes if present.
authoring_summary.ingestion: Rinse the mouth, give plenty of water, do not induce vomiting, and get immediate medical attention.
